section.title: LoggerFactory Class Reference

para.para: Factory class for creating loggers based on the configuration settings.

listitem.para: Creates a logger based on the configuration settings.

section.title: Detailed Description
section.para: Factory class for creating loggers based on the configuration settings.

section.section:
Member Function Documentation
createLogger() createLoggerLoggerFactory LoggerFactorycreateLogger
static std::shared_ptr< ILogger > LoggerFactory::createLogger ( )[inline], [static]
Creates a logger based on the configuration settings.
Returns
A shared pointer to the created logger.
References Settings::get().
Referenced by Log::Log().
The documentation for this class was generated from the following file: Loggers/LoggerFactory.hpp
